title: Building the AI-ready graduate
summary_en: Artificial intelligence is already part of how students learn, and it is starting to change how work gets done. The question for higher education is how to ensure students understand what these systems are doing, not just the answers they produce.
title_cn: 高等教育应着力培养适配人工智能时代的毕业生

title: When opportunities knock: How senior leaders navigate multiple offers with integrity
summary_en: The path to a senior leadership appointment in higher education or the nonprofit sector is rarely linear. It demands months of reflection, rigorous preparation, and a willingness to be scrutinized at the highest levels.
title_cn: When opportunities knock: How senior leaders navigate multiple offers with integrity
